clear_overrides.name: Clear overrides
clear_overrides.description: Return the inverter to self-use mode, clearing all or selected overrides.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Only clear overrides of this mode. If not set, all overrides are cleared.

feedin.name: Feed-in
feedin.description: Export battery power to the grid for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to feed in (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Feed-in power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

force_charge.name: Force charge
force_charge.description: Charge the battery for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force charge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Charge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

force_discharge.name: Force discharge
force_discharge.description: Discharge the battery for a set duration, optionally at a specific time and power limit.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to force discharge (max 4 hours, must not cross midnight).

power.name: Power limit
power.description: Discharge power limit in watts. Defaults to inverter rated power if not set.

start_time.name: Start time
start_time.description: Time of day to start the override. Defaults to now if not set.

user.title: FoxESS Control
user.description: Enter your FoxESS Cloud API credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to FoxESS Cloud API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your API key and device serial number.
